name: Wrath of Angels
briefing_html:
Verat informs you that Yukiro Demense is still operating in Curse and must be permanently dealt with. The implication is clear: killing the body is not enough — Demense's very clone line must be infected.

Upon completion, Verat confirms that Demense will be reactivated into a compromised clone, remarking that he has "contracted a disease which is going to follow him from clone to clone." The reward for this final act is a Domination-grade target painter.
objective_html: Destroy Yukiro Demense and return to agent.

pockets.name: Room 1
pockets.notes: Keep Yukiro Demense at least 40 km from the Remote-Repair Facility before engaging.

npcs.notes: Repairs nearby ships — do not engage Yukiro Demense within 40 km of this structure
